attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway rider who targets KOM points through early moves rather than sustained climbing accelerations. Shows capability on uphill TT efforts but struggles with repeated late-climb attacks.
team_tactics: Operates with autonomy in breakaways, positioning for jersey competitions rather than stage wins. Limited evidence of dedicated team support in observed moves.
terrain_preference: Medium-mountain stages with breakaway-friendly profiles and uphill time trials. Struggles on stages requiring multiple hard accelerations or bridge efforts to maintain breakaway position.
vulnerability: Cannot sustain both prolonged breakaway efforts and late-climb accelerations when rivals bridge across. Tactical miscalculations in KOM jersey competition leave him exposed to GC riders taking points opportunistically.
key_patterns: Targets KOM jersey through breakaway positioning rather than stage wins (3 observations)
Cracks when required to respond to bridge efforts after extended breakaway work (2 observations)
Shows opportunistic positioning to follow attacks from other breakaway riders (2 observations)
Delivers surprising uphill TT performances beyond climbing expectations (1 observation, 33s gain)
form_trajectory: negative: Multiple instances of cracking under pressure at Tour de France, tactical failures cost KOM jersey despite breakaway efforts
